_comment: Optional plain-language 'how to make this sign' notes, keyed by manifest sign key. Shown under the demo video. NOTE: these describe Indian Sign Language (ISL) and should be reviewed by an ISL expert before relying on specifics. Add entries freely; missing keys simply show no breakdown.
A: Make a fist with your thumb resting against the side.
B: Hold your hand flat and open, fingers together, thumb tucked in.
C: Curve your hand into the shape of the letter C.
O: Round your fingers and thumb together into an O shape.
L: Point your index finger up and stick your thumb out to make an L.
HELLO: A friendly greeting near the head — keep it relaxed and smile.
BYE: A simple waving motion, just like saying goodbye.
YOU: Point clearly toward the person you mean.
GOOD: A positive, open gesture moving outward from yourself.
HAPPY: An upward, lively motion near the chest — let your face smile too.
